title: ilex duarteensis
intro: Ilex duarteensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliolidae, commonly known as a type of holly tree. The leaves and bark of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antiparasitic actions. The health benefits of Ilex duarteensis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function and reducing oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Ilex duarteensis may be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
